title: Mixed conditionals
subtitle: Connect past causes with present results.
overview: Mixed conditionals explain how past events affect now.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: Si hubiera estudiado más, ahora hablaría mejor.
If I had studied more, now I would speak better.
Si no hubiera cambiado de rutina, seguiría igual.
If I had not changed routine, I would still be the same.

items.es: Si hubiera escuchado más español antes, ahora entendería mejor los acentos.
items.en: If I had listened to more Spanish before, now I would understand accents better.

items.es: Si no hubiera practicado en voz alta, todavía tendría miedo de hablar.
items.en: If I had not practiced aloud, I would still be afraid to speak.

items.es: Si hubiera aceptado ese trabajo, ahora viviría en otra ciudad.
items.en: If I had accepted that job, now I would live in another city.

items.es: Si no me hubieran ayudado, hoy no tendría tanta confianza.
items.en: If they had not helped me, today I would not have so much confidence.

items.es: Mi presente sería distinto si hubiera tomado otra decisión.
items.en: My present would be different if I had made another decision.
